description_long: This is a rectangular grocery bag wrapped in a cream-colored material adorned with a repeating pattern of large red polka dots. The bag appears to be made of a flexible, glossy plastic or coated paper, giving it a slightly crinkled and reflective surface. On one side, there is a decorative floral embellishment featuring red and yellow flowers with green leaves, adding a touch of visual interest. The top of the bag is slightly indented and appears to be partially open, suggesting it is not completely full. No handles are visible, and the bag maintains a boxy, upright shape. The overall appearance is festive and eye-catching, suitable for carrying groceries or gifts in an urban environment.
description: A cream-colored, rectangular grocery bag with red polka dots and a floral decoration, made of glossy, flexible material and partially open at the top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cream bag with red polka dots and a visible top indentation, no handles or decorations on this side.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the floral embellishment and the bag's boxy, upright shape with a slightly crumpled surface.
description_view_2: Back view highlighting the floral decoration in the center and the glossy, patterned surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with only the polka dot pattern visible, no floral decoration or handles.
